description_long: This is an old, weathered gravestone set in a patch of earth covered with dry leaves and some moss. The gravestone is made of stone and features a prominent cross at the top, with ornate carved details and a rectangular base. The front face shows some faint engravings, though they are not clearly legible, and the stone is mottled with patches of lichen and discoloration from age. The back of the gravestone is plain and unadorned, while the sides are narrow and show the thickness of the stone. The base is partially embedded in the ground, surrounded by natural debris, giving it an aged and solemn appearance. The overall structure is solid and upright, typical of traditional cemetery headstones.
description: A weathered stone gravestone with a carved cross on top, set in leaf-covered earth and showing signs of age and moss.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate cross, carved details, and faint engravings on the gravestone's face.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the gravestone and the depth of the stone base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back of the gravestone and the surrounding leaves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the stone's thickness and the moss at the base.
